choices.text: [macdLine, signalLine, histogram] = ta.macd(close, 12, 26, 9). Pine destructures tuples. Same for ta.bb (middle/upper/lower) and ta.stoch (k/d).

questions.explanation: [a, b, c] = ta.macd() destructures tuple return.

choices.text: Stop loss + position sizing. stopDistance = atr * 2 places stop beyond normal noise. Volatility-aware sizing prevents over-leverage in fast markets.
